original: While this dildo doesn’t bear the typical TamaniCorp manufacturer’s label you’d expect to find on a high class insertable, it does bear another mark corresponding to a relative unknown: one Doctor Po. According to a quick extranet search, similar toys have been found across the galaxy and almost unanimously have a sluttifying effect on those who use them. This particularly one seems primed to make quite the mess, if the sloshing sound coming from the dense, rubbery balls is any indication.\n\nKnown to cause moderate amounts of taint. Check your Codex for details.
